payload.claim_text: NYCT $80M favorable, mainly due to lower than projected vacancy/absentee coverage.
payload.subject: NYCT
payload.description: Reason for $80M favorable variance in non-reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: LIRR: $1M unfavorable, mainly due to more weather emergencies and unscheduled maintenance.
payload.subject: LIRR
payload.description: Reason for $1M unfavorable variance in non-reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: MNR: $89M spent YTD, essentially on budget, primarily driven by lower programmatic maintenance.
payload.subject: MNR
payload.description: Reason MNR was essentially on budget for non-reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: MTA Bus: $97M spent YTD and $1M unfavorable, primarily due to maintenance vacancies and absence coverage.
payload.subject: MTA Bus
payload.description: Reason for $1M unfavorable variance in non-reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: MTA HQ: $28M spent YTD and $9M unfavorable, mainly due to MTA PD-related safety/security/law enforcement and vacancy/absentee coverage and MTA IT.
payload.subject: MTA HQ
payload.description: Reason for $9M unfavorable variance in non-reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: B&T: $32M spent YTD and $2M unfavorable, due to higher attrition and vacancy coverage.
payload.subject: B&T
payload.description: Reason for $2M unfavorable variance in non-reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: SIR: $4M spent YTD and $0.4M unfavorable, mainly due to the timing of reimbursable charges.
payload.subject: SIR
payload.description: Reason for $0.4M unfavorable variance in non-reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: NYCT: $217M spent YTD and $27M unfavorable, primarily due to vacancy/absentee coverage.
payload.subject: NYCT
payload.description: Reason for $27M unfavorable variance in reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: LIRR: $54M spent YTD and $5M unfavorable, mainly due to higher reimbursable overtime attributed to various capital projects and Transportation flagging needs.
payload.subject: LIRR
payload.description: Reason for $5M unfavorable variance in reimbursable overtime

payload.claim_text: MNR: $39M spent YTD and $1M unfavorable mainly due to higher maintenance of way capital work.
payload.subject: MNR
payload.description: Reason for $1M unfavorable variance in reimbursable overtime
